query:
-- Insert the 4 products from the inspiration screenshots
INSERT INTO investment_products (name, description, color) VALUES
  ('PFA Middel', 'Blandet portefølje med middel risiko', '#6b7280'),
  ('PFA KlimA Plus', 'Klimavenlig blandet portefølje', '#9ca3af'),
  ('Nordea Mix Høj', 'Blandet portefølje med høj risiko', '#f59e0b'),
  ('Nordea 100% Aktier', '100% aktieportefølje', '#10b981');

-- PFA Middel returns (product id 1)
INSERT INTO annual_returns (productId, year, returnPct) VALUES
  (1, 2021, 11.7),
  (1, 2022, -10.8),
  (1, 2023, 9.2),
  (1, 2024, 9.6),
  (1, 2025, 8.1);

-- PFA KlimA Plus returns (product id 2)
INSERT INTO annual_returns (productId, year, returnPct) VALUES
  (2, 2021, 11.3),
  (2, 2022, -12.8),
  (2, 2023, 7.3),
  (2, 2024, 10.6),
  (2, 2025, 7.2);

-- Nordea Mix Høj returns (product id 3)
INSERT INTO annual_returns (productId, year, returnPct) VALUES
  (3, 2021, 21.6),
  (3, 2022, -9.0),
  (3, 2023, 13.6),
  (3, 2024, 18.7),
  (3, 2025, 8.3);

-- Nordea 100% Aktier returns (product id 4)
INSERT INTO annual_returns (productId, year, returnPct) VALUES
  (4, 2021, 31.55),
  (4, 2022, -11.8),
  (4, 2023, 26.03),
  (4, 2024, 22.38),
  (4, 2025, 8.8);
